<!-- Brief description of what this PR does / Deskripsi singkat tentang apa yang dilakukan PR ini -->

## Type of Change / Jenis Perubahan

- [ ] `feat` — New feature / Fitur baru
- [ ] `fix` — Bug fix / Perbaikan bug
- [ ] `docs` — Documentation / Dokumentasi
- [ ] `refactor` — Code refactor / Refaktor kode
- [ ] `test` — Tests / Pengujian
- [ ] `chore` — Maintenance / Pemeliharaan
- [ ] `perf` — Performance / Performa
- [ ] `style` — Code style / Gaya kode

## Component / Komponen

- [ ] framework (Python backend)
- [ ] interface (Next.js frontend)
- [ ] cli (Node.js CLI)
- [ ] workers
- [ ] documentation
- [ ] infrastructure (CI/CD, Docker, etc.)

## Checklist

- [ ] Code follows project style guidelines (Ruff/ESLint)
- [ ] Tests added/updated for changes
- [ ] Documentation updated (if applicable)
- [ ] No breaking changes (or clearly documented)
- [ ] Commit messages follow [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/)
- [ ] Self-reviewed the code
- [ ] No API keys or secrets in the code
